name: consuelo-workspace-snapshot
title: Consuelo Workspace Snapshot
description: Reads a structured, read-only snapshot of Consuelo workspace objects, including Files and Attachments, through the configured Consuelo GraphQL/API facade.
trigger: Invoke when the user asks an agent to inspect Consuelo workspace records, files, attachments, tasks, notes, dashboards, or GraphQL-backed workspace context.
